title: The Inside of the Cup
writer: Albert Capellani, Winston Churchill, George DuBois Proctor
actors: William P. Carleton, David Torrence, Edith Hallor
plot: John Hodder becomes rector of St. John's, a fashionable church, situated near a slum neighborhood, in the town of Bremerton. Eldon Parr, a wealthy and prominent member of the parish, drives his daughter, Alison, and son, Preston, ...
